basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has released the official Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. JIP/EM&T/F-MAI/CMR-INDIA EMS Project/2026/N03D. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the JIPMER Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Master's Degree in Public Health, Psychology, Social Work, Sociology, Nursing, Life Sciences, Rural Development, or related disciplines, along with the required experience as specified in the notification, and aged up t

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Public Health / Psychology / Social work/Sociology/ Nursing/Life Sciences / rural development or related areas, Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with PHD, Good communication skills in Tamil & English, Research experience (one year) in field of emergency care or Qualitative research
qualification.details: Master of Public Health / Psychology / Social work/Sociology/ Nursing/Life Sciences / rural development or related areas. Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with PHD. Good communication skills in Tamil & English. Research experience (one year) in field of emergency care or Qualitative research. Experience in working in projects/programs at State level. Skills in planning and conducting research /survey related training programme. Candidate must be willing to travel to urban and rural health facilities in district of Pondicherry for data collection. Undertaken Health related field-based data collection. Ability to plan, coordinate field-based survey.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Research Scientist – I (Non - Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Project Research Scientist I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master of Public Health / Psychology / Social work/Sociology/ Nursing/Life Sciences / rural development or related areas. Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with PHD. Good communication skills in Tamil & English. Research experience (one year) in field of emergency care or Qualitative research. Experience in working in projects/programs at State level. Skills in planning and conducting research /survey related training programme. Candidate must be willing to travel to urban and rural health facilities in district of Pondicherry for data collection. Undertaken Health related field-based data collection. Ability to plan, coordinate field-based survey.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Research Scientist – I (Non - Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Research Scientist – I (Non - Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 29th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Public Health, Psychology, Social Work, Sociology, Nursing, Life Sciences, or Rural Development, or related fields. A Second Class Post Graduate Degree, including integrated PG degrees with PhD, is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist – I (Non - Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,200 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Research Scientist – I (Non - Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at JIPMER.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist – I (Non - Medical).

faq.question: Q9. What are the required skills for this position?
faq.answer: Good communication skills in Tamil and English, research experience in emergency care or qualitative research, and experience in project management are essential.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Puducherry.
